text: A being is doing something at this point that is brilliant.
A young girl is holding three teddy bears.
there is a close up picture of a train going down the tracks
The pastry in the right hand is strikingly similar to a large pile of animal dung.
A truck is approaching an intersection with a green light
a cow drinking some water while the other cows eat some grass
A mall filled with lots of stairs and a large clock.
People are standing next to a green subway train looking at their phones and talking.
A smiling woman reclining in a hospital bed.
The American flag flies next to the clock tower on a snowy day.
